escalation.rationale: Sustained Russian guided-bomb strikes on Ukrainian cities, Khamenei funeral drawing millions amid Israeli threats against his successor, Trump-Putin call on Ukraine ceasefire, and Iranian Hormuz fee declarations for 'friendly' nations keep the multi-theater conflict environment firmly in High territory.

ticker_items: Russian guided bombs kill 4, wound dozens in Sumy overnight.
Millions gather in Tehran for Khamenei funeral; Iran asserts Hormuz control.
Trump offers Ukraine war mediation to Putin in 90-minute Kremlin call.
Ukrainian 'Flamingo' missiles reported deep inside Russian territory near Alatyr.
Israel defense minister threatens Khamenei's successor with 'death mark.'

eastern_europe.description: Russian nightlong guided bomb attack struck Sumy, with one strike near a residential building, killing at least 4 and injuring dozens.
Russian strikes injured at least 10 people across Ukraine's Zaporizhzhia and Odesa regions.
Russian strikes caused injuries in the Odesa region as part of a broader attack alongside Zaporizhzhia.
Ukrainian 'Flamingo' missiles were reportedly spotted deep inside Russian territory near Alatyr, indicating a long-range strike effort.

middle_east.description: IDF operations continued in Gaza including tunnel destruction and Central Command arrests of approximately 60 militants.

today.incident: Russian guided bomb attack on Sumy
Russian strikes on Zaporizhzhia and Odesa regions

today.kia: ~3,468 in Iran; ~3,696 in Lebanon; ~28 in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: Deaths from US-Israel attacks on Iran
claimed_totals.figure: ~3,468 in Iran; ~3,696 in Lebanon; ~28 in Gulf states

russia.text: Trump made an offer to help end the Russia-Ukraine war during a nearly 90-minute phone call with the Russian president.
russia.speaker: Yury Ushakov
russia.title: Kremlin Aide

ukraine.text: Progress has been made, but there will be no swift victory over Russia.
ukraine.speaker: Oleksandr Syrsky
ukraine.title: Commander-in-Chief, Ukrainian Armed Forces

ukraine.text: Zelenskyy urged greater pressure on Moscow following the deadly Sumy bomb attack.
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: The Strait of Hormuz is under Tehran's command, directly rejecting a US-led regional security dialogue.
middle_east.speaker: Senior Iranian Official
middle_east.title: Iranian Government

middle_east.text: Iran's China envoy vowed 'special' Hormuz treatment for 'friendly' countries, with new transit fees for others.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Ambassador to China
middle_east.title: Iranian Envoy

middle_east.text: Iran's acting defense minister called for a joint security mechanism among Islamic countries against extra-regional forces.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Acting Defense Minister
middle_east.title: Acting Defense Minister of Iran

observers.description: Trump engaged Putin directly in a 90-minute phone call offering to mediate the Ukraine war, while the US continues to manage post-conflict terms with Iran over Hormuz and broader Middle East stability. NATO unity ahead of the Turkey summit is a key concern, with disputes over burden sharing and US military commitments.

European NATO allies have largely replaced military assets cut by the US from contingency plans, according to NATO's top commander. European conservative lawmakers visited Washington urging that Ukraine support and Iran concerns are complementary priorities ahead of the upcoming NATO summit.

Iran is in a period of leadership transition following Khamenei's death, with millions gathering for his funeral. Acting officials are asserting Hormuz control, proposing tiered transit fees for 'friendly' nations, and calling for an Islamic security alliance, while indirect talks with the US continue via Qatar.

Israel's defense minister has publicly threatened Khamenei's successor, signaling continued offensive posture. IDF operations in Gaza and the West Bank continued, with tunnel destruction and arrest operations reported this week.

Kim Jong Un congratulated Xi Jinping on the CCP's 105th anniversary, reinforcing the Sino-North Korean alignment. China and Russia conducted joint military aircraft incursions into South Korea's air defense identification zone last week. Iran's envoy to Beijing vowed preferential Hormuz access for China as a 'friendly' country.

Kim Jong Un signaled continued alignment with China ahead of what the Trump administration frames as a denuclearization push. North Korea's military-industrial support to Russia is an ongoing concern per analyst commentary, though no new direct supply headline was reported today.
Lithuanian lawmakers launched a constitutional bid to remove the country's ban on hosting nuclear weapons, with President Nauseda calling the ban 'outdated' amid elevated NATO-Russia tensions.

Qatar's Foreign Ministry reported progress in indirect US-Iran talks, positioning Doha as a key intermediary in post-Khamenei diplomatic maneuvering. Qatar continues its established role as a backchannel between Washington and Tehran.

financial.notes: EU crypto sanctions targeting networks tied to the Russia-Ukraine war signal a broadening financial warfare front, while Hormuz transit fee threats from Iran's new leadership retain upside risk pressure on oil prices despite the Strait's nominal reopening.

update_log.text: Iran's ambassador to China vows 'special' Hormuz treatment for friendly nations; new fees announced for others.
Kremlin aide confirms Trump offered to help end Russia-Ukraine war in nearly 90-minute call with Putin.
Millions gather in Tehran as week-long Khamenei funeral ceremonies officially begin.
Ukrainian 'Flamingo' missiles reported spotted deep inside Russia near Alatyr.
Russian guided bomb attack on Sumy kills at least 4 civilians and injures dozens overnight.
Russian strikes on Zaporizhzhia and Odesa regions injure at least 10 people.
Israel's defense minister publicly declares Khamenei's successor 'marked for death' before funeral ceremonies begin.
EU crypto sanctions announced targeting financial networks tied to the Russia-Ukraine war.
